text:
The user is seeing a `[File activity]` signal indicating that `canvas/mica-solar-system.filebrowser` was added. This is a canvas file change that I didn't author. Per the project guidelines, I should acknowledge this briefly and take no action unless it directs me otherwise.

This is just a filebrowser card being added to the canvas - likely by the user or as part of project setup. No action needed on my part.
